label: 🚀 Triad Execute
desc: Triggers collaborative review between Gemini (Strategy), Antigravity (Architect), and Claude (Code).

label: 🔄 Refine App
desc: Give feedback about a built app. The Critic will analyze it and the Factory will apply improvements.

label: 🛠️ System Diagnostic
cmd: Run full system diagnostic and check agent connectivity.
desc: Verifies that Docker, n8n, and API endpoints are all responding correctly.

label: 🧹 Flush Memory
cmd: Wipe sentry cache and reset DCC.
desc: Clears stale session data and ghost errors to resolve system freezes.

label: ⏪ Rollback
cmd: Revert to last stable git/snapshot build.
desc: Instantly undoes changes if the 'Self-Heal' logic fails to stabilize the build.

label: 🛡️ Security Audit
cmd: Run Specialist - Security audit on current code.
desc: Scans for vulnerabilities and ensures enterprise-grade security standards.

label: 🧪 Twin Test
cmd: Spin up Digital Twin container and run integration tests.
desc: Tests features in a sandbox before merging them into your live factory.

label: 🩹 Self-Heal
cmd: Review recent logs and repair execution errors.
desc: Commands the Architect and Critic to fix bugs in the current runtime.

label: 🔍 Market Research
cmd: Analyze market competitors and prior art for this task.
desc: Forces the system to innovate by checking what similar apps already exist.

label: 📦 Docker Export
cmd: Package current application for cloud deployment.
desc: Flattens the current build into a clean state ready for a production server.
